---
name: "✦ New Pattern Request"
about: "Propose a new design aesthetic for the gallery"
title: "[PATTERN] Pattern Name"
labels: ["new-pattern", "needs-review"]
assignees: ""
---

## Pattern Name
<!-- What is this pattern called? Use the industry-standard name if one exists. -->

---

## One-Line Description
<!-- Summarize the pattern's visual identity in a single sharp sentence. Not a definition — a decision-making tool. -->

---

## The Case For Adding It

**Is this distinct from existing patterns?**
<!-- Explain how it differs from the 20 already in the gallery. Be specific. -->

**Is this used in real, shipped products?**
<!-- Name 2-3 live products that clearly use this pattern. -->

**Who would use this and why?**
<!-- What founder, developer, or designer would choose this over alternatives? -->

---

## Effort Estimate
<!-- Your honest assessment: Low / Medium / High to implement from scratch? Why? -->

---

## Visual Reference
<!-- Link 2-3 reference images or live URLs that represent the pattern at its best. -->

---

## Checklist
- [ ] I've searched existing issues and this pattern hasn't been requested before
- [ ] This is distinct from all 20 patterns currently in the gallery
- [ ] I can name at least 2 real products that use this pattern
- [ ] I understand that approval is required before building the animated preview
